name: Eggplant Stuffed L'italienne
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 c Bread crumbs, home made or p
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Cut the eggplants in half lengthwise. Remove the flesh carefully without damaging the skin. Mince the pulp and place it in a colander sprinkled with coarse salt for 30 minutes. Repeat with the eggplant shells and drain on paper towel.
3. Heat 4 tablespoons olive oil in a large skillet. Add the well-drained eggplant pulp and cook until lightly browned. Add the tomatoes and cook the mixture over high heat until the liquid evaporates.
4. Add the remaining ingredients (Note: Tuna fish or olives are not used if this is a side dish; they would be necessary for a main dish entree). Cook for 2 more minutes, seasoning carefully as anchovies and capers have strong flavors.
5. Fill the eggplant halves with the mixture. Drizzle leftover olive oil on top and bake for 1 hour.
